supervised=True は同一 request 形状(system+seed+enable_thinking=False)を保ったまま Runtime Supervisor 経由に
し、staged recovery + Execution-Even

defines.name: _parse_traceback
defines.doc: Return (last_frame_file, error_type) from a python traceback, or (None, error_type|None).

defines.name: probe_environment
defines.doc: Return {any_corruption, corruption[], checks, insufficient, subclass}. See module note above.

defines.name: classify_test_failure
defines.doc:
Classify a NEUTRAL-runner test failure. Returns {defect_class, basis[], deterministic, inputs}.

HARD INVARIANT (design req 3): worker_self_report is accepted ONLY to be recorded/ignored — it is NEVER

defines.name: build_test_failure_finding
defines.doc:
A `test_failure` finding (reuses the existing finding shape + the disposition._TEST_CATEGORIES category).
Carries the NEUTRAL-runner-facing identifiers + the requirement/shown-test the tier-2 referenc

defines.name: adjudicate
defines.doc:
3-tier adjudication (DE-0324 order) + an env-signal EXECUTION pre-gate (DE-0333). Tier0.5=confirmed
environment corruption (measured env_signals) -> EXECUTION_DEFECT before anything else; tier1=determ

defines.name: adjudicate_dispose_fn
defines.doc:
A DISPOSE dispose_fn (same shape as dw.disposition.reproduction_dispose_fn) for test_failure findings.
Runs the 3-tier adjudicate() from the NEUTRAL runner's recorded test_result — never the worker's

defines.name: defect_class_in_dispositions
defines.doc: Return the test-failure defect_class recorded in a DISPOSE payload's finding_dispositions, or None.

defines.name: _last_defect_class
defines.doc: The defect_class of the most recent DISPOSE (for the EXECUTION-retry branch in the worker), or None.

defines.name: reconstruct_code
defines.doc:
Recover the last GENERATE's code from its recorded diff (the beta worker stores '+ '-prefixed source).
Used ONLY to re-execute the SAME code for an EXECUTION retry — never to change it.

defines.name: authorize
defines.doc: 新規 AUTHORIZED を append。5 field のみ。

defines.name: revoke
defines.doc: REVOKED を append(元 record は書き換えない=append-only)。

defines.name: current_authorizations
defines.doc: append-only ledger から現在 AUTHORIZED な authorization を導出(id ごとに最新 status)。

defines.name: check_assignment
defines.doc:
current matching AUTHORIZED があれば MAY_PROCEED(+subject)、無ければ ESCALATE。
DW は adequacy を判定しない=authorization の有無だけを見る。

defines.name: assign
defines.doc:
DW の assignment 決定。authorization で解決（人間に ad-hoc 確認しない）。
返り: (subject|None, decision_dict)。ESCALATE 時は subject=None。

defines.name: check
defines.doc: Return a conformance verdict for one completed op. verdict in {PASS, PASS_OPEN, HALT, SKIP}.

defines.name: next_legal_operation
defines.doc:
PURE function of persisted state. A fresh process calls this and learns the next operation,
the actor that must run it, and the input packet it needs — with ZERO Claude reasoning.

defines.name: dispatch_once
defines.doc:
Advance the task by exactly one operation.
- machine actor (worker/auditor): run via the supplied adapter, record the result, return dispatched.
- Claude barrier (dispose/upper_review/plan): DO NOT se

defines.name: run_until_barrier
defines.doc:
Loop dispatch_once until a Claude/human barrier, COMPLETE, or BLOCKED. Returns the trace.
THIS is the outer loop — deterministic Python over persisted state, NOT Claude.

defines.name: _emit_pending
defines.doc:
Persist the fact that the loop is waiting for a specific actor with a specific input — so a
fresh launcher/process (or Claude) knows exactly what to run next without reconstructing intent.

defines.name: _reproduced
defines.doc: -> True/False if mechanically determinable from recorded state, else None (needs judgment).

defines.name: mechanically_dispositionable
defines.doc: True only if EVERY finding's reproduction is determinable from recorded state (no judgment needed).

defines.name: reproduction_dispose_fn
defines.doc: Deterministic disposition: ACCEPT reproducing findings, REJECT non-reproducing. Recorded basis.

defines.name: run_command
defines.doc: Execute a command with strict security policy checks (real subprocess, shell=False).

defines.name: create_knowledge_packet
defines.doc: The knowledge_packet recorded at CREATE (the candidate/goal packet), or None.

defines.name: is_bounded_reproduction_candidate
defines.doc:
True ONLY for a source-grounded bounded read-only-first reproduction candidate. Strict: an empty/absent
or free-form packet returns False (stays a Claude barrier). Deterministic, no judgment.

defines.name: template_plan
defines.doc: Deterministic implementation_packet derived entirely from the candidate record. No LLM.

defines.name: plannable
defines.doc: True iff this task's recorded CREATE packet is a bounded reproduction candidate (PLAN is rule-based).

defines.name: evidence
defines.doc: The deterministic invariants (from recorded DW state, no LLM). trivially_clean iff ALL hold.

defines.name: auto_pass_review
defines.doc:
Record a deterministic machine UPPER_REVIEW PASS for the trivially-clean case ONLY, carrying the checked
invariants as the review's evidence trail. NOT authority approval; final completion still via P

defines.name: WorkflowViolation
defines.doc: gate が拒否した不正遷移 / COMPLETE bypass。Manager でも越えられない。

defines.name: _tf_defect_class
defines.doc:
DE-0324: the test-failure defect_class recorded in a DISPOSE payload's finding_dispositions, or None.
Returns None for every pre-adjudicator disposition (no defect_class field) -> routing stays unchan

defines.name: derive_state
defines.doc: event log を時系列に fold して state を導出(self-report でなく、順序に忠実)。返り: (state, view)。

defines.name: record_process_event
defines.doc:
実行過程 primitive を events.jsonl に append。derive_state は無視、derive_process_trace が使う。
kind: RUN_START|RUN_END|SWAP_START|SWAP_END|PHASE_MARK|PATCH_APPLICATION|RECONCILIATION_BALANCED|RECONCILIATION_IMBALA

defines.name: _dur
defines.doc: 2 つの ISO timestamp 間の秒。導出のみ(measurement summary を信じない)。

defines.name: derive_process_trace
defines.doc:
authoritative event log(events.jsonl の primitive)から PROCESS_TRACE を導出。
trial JSON の self-reported latency は使わない。model-switch は SWAP_START/SWAP_END の timestamp 差から計算。

defines.name: _latest_findings
defines.doc: 最新 audit run の findings(rework 後の re-audit を優先)。

defines.name: _independent_audit_runs
defines.doc:
generate run の identity と *異なる* identity の audit run のみを independent と認める(F1)。
identity は adapter が刻むもので、任意 actor 文字列でない。

defines.name: completion_blockers
defines.doc: COMPLETE を阻む理由の list(空なら gate 通過可)。SRC-A §7.15 + DWREV-0001 F1/F3。

defines.name: build_result_packet
defines.doc: RESULT_PACKET を構築。F4: admission verdict の混入を禁止(DW は確定しない)。

defines.name: record_generate
defines.doc: worker_run = {identity, run_id, diff, test_result, problems}。identity は worker adapter が刻む。

defines.name: record_audit
defines.doc:
auditor_run = {identity, run_id, findings}。**F1**: audit は auditor adapter の run 由来のみ。
identity は adapter が刻む(任意 actor で audit を偽装する経路はここに無い)。

defines.name: record_disposition
defines.doc:
§3: MANAGER が最新 audit の findings を disposition。verdict∈{ACCEPTED,PARTIAL,REJECTED,REMAINS}。
PARTIAL は accepted_portion 必須。malformed verdict は fail-closed。raw findings は reworker に渡さない
(reworker input

defines.name: rework_items
defines.doc:
§3: reworker に渡す work items = 最新 audit の ACCEPTED finding + PARTIAL の accepted_portion のみ。
REJECTED / REMAINS は渡さない(raw auditor findings を worker instruction にしない)。

defines.name: propose_complete
defines.doc:
Manager は COMPLETE を *提案* するだけ。gate が event log を見て決める。bypass 経路は無い。
通れば COMPLETE event + RESULT_PACKET(contracts/out/)。通らなければ WorkflowViolation。

defines.name: _Clock
defines.doc: 決定的 timestamp(test 用)。実運用は harness の時刻を渡す。

defines.name: _default_dispose
defines.doc:
§3 default Manager disposition(hermetic): 全 finding を ACCEPTED。実 runner は
counterexample-based dispose_fn を渡し、reproduce しない finding を REJECTED にする。

defines.name: run_standard_workflow
defines.doc:
1 Task Unit を end-to-end で貫通。返り: (state, result_packet_or_None, trace)。
§3: AUDIT → MANAGER DISPOSITION → (accepted/partial のみ)REGENERATE → re-AUDIT。
raw findings は自動で rework 指示にならない。threshold 超で JUDG

defines.name: validate_packet

defines.name: strength_guard

statement wording を claim_class / validation_mode / basis / scope と照合し、
evidence-strength inflation を flag。lexical+schema。完全な意味含意は主張しない(fail-conservative)。

defines.name: compose_ok

defines.name: render_compact

defines.name: render_expanded

defines.name: load_taka_events
defines.doc: Read append-only AUTONOMY_LEDGER.jsonl (Taka correction events). dict-only, guarded.

defines.name: _apply_taka_overlay
defines.doc:
Apply Taka correction events to the mechanical state, with VISIBLE downstream effects.
Append-only supersession: the LAST event per target_object wins (reversible). v0 realizes
HOLD/REJECT/PRIORITY_OV

defines.name: _walk_seal_refs
defines.doc:
Yield (path, expected_sha256) pairs found anywhere in a seal JSON.
Two shapes: {"path":..,"sha256":..} dicts, and {"<file/path>": "<64hex>"} maps
(e.g. companion_hashes). Hash-only pins (no file path)

defines.name: verify_seals
defines.doc: MECHANICAL: recompute sha256 of each referenced file vs the recorded value.

defines.name: validation_failures
defines.doc: MECHANICAL: scan known result artifacts for explicit failure flags.

defines.name: closed_branches
defines.doc: CLAUDE-DERIVED (heuristic): free-text decision/replication_status keyword match.

defines.name: build_current_state
defines.doc: Side-effect-free. Returns the state dict. Writes nothing.

defines.name: _worker_infer_objective
defines.doc: NON-AUTHORITATIVE worker guess at the working objective. Never promoted to program objective.

defines.name: ingest_problem
defines.doc: Record a Taka problem. stated_objective is authoritative iff Taka provided it.

defines.name: assemble_handoff
defines.doc:
Build the 2DER->Claude handoff. relevant_history is LIVE (retrieval); reconstruction/detection/
triage for a general problem are honestly MISSING. Claude must start from THIS, not the raw prompt.

defines.name: gather_evidence
defines.doc: Load the real artifact behind a work item (read-only). Handles JSON or plain text. Compact.

defines.name: run_one_cycle
defines.doc: Router selects next work -> investigate -> record. Returns (inv | None, rationale).

Pure inspection: read git (read-only) + files, fold the event stream, return a verdict. Writes NOTHING.

Pull-type freshness for the minter (BIND-2). `event_log` is the merged, append-ordered event log

defines.name: _EventLog

runner 固有フィールドは**すべて payload の中**に置く(R2-4)。

実 adapter(ACQ_HTTP_STATIC/ACQ_GITHUB)は egl.adapters が transport/content status を付す。

defines.name: run_acquisition

adapter_result = adapter が付けた終端状態。RD は付けない(ACQ-1)。
plan/required は AcquisitionRun payload でなく immutable LegIntent から解決(ACQ-3)。

退化する)。acquisition_run_id は同一 leg の run でなければならない=c

defines.name: _idlock
defines.doc: H6: 跨プロセス排他。high-water 読取〜event 書込を1つの critical section に。

defines.name: _high_water
defines.doc:
log 全 event の event_id / object_id から prefix 毎の最大連番を導出(単一 SoR)。
counters.json を持たない=喪失し得ない。high-water は log からの帰結にすぎない。

defines.name: _check_complete_revision
defines.doc:
partial-update を構造 reject。UPDATE の payload は現 object の全キー(top-level +
1段ネスト)を包含しなければならない。『完全 object を書く契約』を driver 正直性(M1)に
委ねず append_event 側で検査する。shallow-merge の兄弟キー喪失(M4)を構造的に不可能に。

defines.name: append_event
defines.doc:
